name: @campfire/openclaw-plugin
description: OpenClaw plugin that backs the Campfire workspace. Exposes app/artifact/db tools to the agent and the campfire.* gateway RPCs to the Campfire client.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --external:openclaw --external:openclaw/* --external:node:* --loader:.json=json --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'node:module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
